DISCOVERY 612, NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S DISCOVERY REQUESTS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED IN THE AMOUNT OF $524.30, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. COMM: EVERETT HEWLETT

DISCOVERY, 612, NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AS THE PROOF OF SERVICE IS INADEQUATE. A HEARSAY PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE IS NOT COMPETENT EVIDENCE THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED. THE PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE MUST BE SIGNED BY THE PERSON WHO ACTUALLY SERVED THE MOTION. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
